pricing.title: Simple, One-Time Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscription. No expiry. Pay once, use anytime.
pricing.no_subscription: No subscription. No expiry. Pay once, use anytime.
pricing.faq_1_a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software companies use to filter resumes. Over 90% of Fortune 500 companies use ATS, and most resumes never reach a human if they're not optimized.
pricing.faq_2_q: How accurate is the match score?
pricing.faq_2_a: Our AI analyzes keyword matching, experience relevance, format compatibility, and tone — giving you a comprehensive score that closely mirrors what real ATS systems evaluate.
pricing.faq_3_a: Basic and Pro credits never expire — use them whenever you need. Only the Unlimited plan has a 90-day access window.
pricing.faq_4_q: Is my resume safe? Who can see it?
pricing.faq_4_a: Your resume text is sent to OpenAI's API solely to generate your analysis. OpenAI does not use API inputs to train their models and deletes data within 30 days. Your analysis results are stored in our database to power your history dashboard. We never sell or share your personal data with third parties. You can request deletion of your account data at any time by contacting us.
pricing.faq_5_a: Credits are digital goods delivered instantly, so we do not offer refunds once credits have been used. If a technical error on our end prevented the service from working, contact us within 7 days and we will make it right.
